data.title: Siemens Energy Reports Increased Voting Rights Held by Morgan Stanley
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) is now available.

Siemens Energy AG has released a voting rights announcement indicating that Morgan Stanley now holds a total of 9.27% of voting rights in the company, up from 8.32%. This change is primarily due to the non-application of the Custody Exemption under German securities law. The increase in voting rights held by Morgan Stanley could have strategic implications for Siemens Energy’s shareholder structure and governance, potentially affecting the company’s decision-making processes and future strategic directions.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG operates within the energy sector, providing a range of products and services focused on energy generation and transmission. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and it is actively involved in the regulated markets across several German cities including Frankfurt, Berlin, and Munich.

YTD Price Performance: 20.56%

Average Trading Volume: 11,138

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $52.44B

data.title: IDACORP Reports Increased Earnings for 2024
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from IdaCorp ( (IDA) ).

IDACORP, Inc. reported a net income of $37.9 million for the fourth quarter of 2024 and $289.2 million for the full year, showing increased earnings compared to 2023. This growth was driven by customer growth, favorable weather conditions, and tax credits, although higher depreciation and financing costs posed challenges. Looking ahead to 2025, IDACORP anticipates earnings in the range of $5.65 to $5.85 per diluted share, underpinned by continued capital investment and the utilization of tax credits.

More about IdaCorp

IDACORP, Inc. operates within the utilities industry, primarily providing electric power services through its subsidiary, Idaho Power Company. The company focuses on catering to the energy needs of a growing customer base in Idaho, emphasizing infrastructure development and energy reliability.

data.title: NevGold Unveils High-Grade Antimony Discovery at Nevada Project
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Nevgold Corp ( (TSE:NAU) ).

NevGold Corp. has discovered significant antimony potential at its Limousine Butte Project in Nevada, identifying high-grade oxide gold and antimony areas through historical surface and drilling geochemical results. This discovery is poised to enhance the project’s value, particularly as antimony is a critical mineral with national security implications, and could impact the global supply chain, considering the current dominance of China, Russia, and Tajikistan in antimony production.

More about Nevgold Corp

NevGold Corp. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development of mineral resources. Its primary products include gold and antimony, with a key market focus on projects in Nevada.

data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Platt Nera International Limited ( (HK:1949) ) has issued an announcement.

Platt Nera International Limited has issued a profit warning and announced a provision for asset impairment, projecting a net loss after tax of no less than THB140 million for FY2024. The losses are attributed to a delay in large projects which are now expected to occur in 2025. This announcement highlights significant financial challenges for the company and advises stakeholders to review the upcoming annual results with caution.

More about Platt Nera International Limited

Platt Nera International Limited is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is involved in the technology sector. The company operates through its subsidiaries and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Bloomin’ Brands Announces Workforce Reduction in Tampa
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Bloomin’ Brands ( (BLMN) ) has issued an announcement.

On February 20, 2025, Bloomin’ Brands announced a workforce reduction at its Tampa, Florida Restaurant Support Center, affecting approximately 100 employees or 17% of the team. This restructuring follows strategic changes, including the re-franchising of its Brazil operations in December 2024, and aims to align costs with business size and focus on growth. The company anticipates incurring $7.5 million in pre-tax costs due to severance but expects annual savings of $22 million. Executive leadership changes were also announced to support the new operational model.

More about Bloomin’ Brands

Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. operates in the restaurant industry, specializing in casual dining. Its primary brands include Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba’s Italian Grill, and Bonefish Grill, with a focus on providing diverse dining experiences primarily in the United States.

Oxford BioMedica ( (GB:OXB) ) just unveiled an update.

Oxford BioMedica PLC announced a change in major holdings, as Ameriprise Financial, Inc., a US-based company, has altered its voting rights in the company. data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.

HMT Ltd. ( (IN:HMT) ) just unveiled an update.

HMT Limited disclosed that HMT (International) Limited, its wholly owned subsidiary, received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department for outstanding amounts from the assessment years 2010 and 2012. The company is consulting with tax advisors to address the situation and ensure compliance, which may affect its financial standing and stakeholder interests.

More about HMT Ltd.

HMT Limited is a company under the Government of India, operating primarily in the manufacturing sector. It has a wholly owned subsidiary, HMT (International) Limited, which plays a significant role in their operations.
